form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 5th (Fr4) over 1660m after showing early pace at Albion Park beaten 15 m by Amillionchances (1:58.80) in 3yo+ NR 38 to 42 on March 30 at $4.20. The start before was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2138m after racing wide at Albion Park beaten 30 m by Sports Bounty (2:33.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 42 on March 24 at $17. Should get his chance from the ace draw.
